entities.name: DOMESTICATED SPECIES
entities.description: Species that have been adapted to human use through selective breeding

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: The process of adapting wild plants and animals for human use

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The intentional mating of plants or animals to achieve specific traits

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process by which certain traits become more or less common in a population

entities.name: GENETIC DRIFT
entities.description: Random changes in allele frequencies within a population

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: DELETERIOUS ALLELES
entities.description: Genetic variants that reduce the fitness of an organism

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: An important pulse legume used for agricultural production

entities.name: PULSE LEGUME
entities.description: A group of legumes harvested for their dry seeds

entities.name: WILD CROP RELATIVES
entities.description: Non-domesticated species closely related to cultivated crops

entities.name: GENETIC BOTTLENECK
entities.description: A sharp reduction in the size of a population, reducing genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC HISTORY
entities.description: The evolutionary lineage and genetic changes of a population over time

entities.name: SEED COAT COLOR CRYPSIS
entities.description: The ability of seed coat color to provide camouflage in the environment

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The external surroundings and conditions affecting an organism

entities.name: GENETIC STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within and between populations

entities.name: TRAIT VALUES
entities.description: The measurable characteristics of a specific trait

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PROPERTIES
entities.description: Characteristics of a crop that are important for agricultural production

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to link genetic markers to specific traits

entities.name: GENE POOLS
entities.description: The total set of all genes and their alleles in a population

entities.name: WILD CROP PROGENITOR SPECIES
entities.description: The wild ancestors from which domesticated crops were derived
